# Phil Greene

Phil Greene builds conversion-focused websites and practical automation for owner-operated local service businesses.

## Core service

High-Converting Websites are the starting point: clear messaging, mobile usability, quote and contact forms, calls and booking paths, local SEO foundations, and analytics.

## Additional services

Lead capture, missed-call text-back, CRM pipelines, appointment booking, automated follow-up, AI reception, honest review requests, and customer reactivation can be added where useful. The Complete Lead Recovery System is the bundled offer.

## Who it serves

Local roofers, junk-removal companies, landscapers, painters, remodelers, cleaning companies, auto-repair shops, electricians, plumbers, HVAC companies, and similar service businesses.

## Location and contact

- Manchester, New Hampshire
- Email: me@philgreene.net
- Website: https://philgreene.net

## Technical background

Phil combines web development, automation, analytics, e-commerce operations, and experience in service, industrial, hospitality, and construction-adjacent environments. He is pursuing a B.S. in Data Science at Southern New Hampshire University.

## Links

- Work and demonstrations: https://philgreene.net/projects
- GitHub: https://github.com/WebCraftPhil
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/phil.greene1
